title: OAP agent definition frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter for agent definition markdown files (FR-001, FR-002, NF-003). Unknown keys are allowed at parse time; preserve through round-trips.

name.description: Unique identifier (kebab-case recommended; enforced by quality linter SC-004).

description.description: What the agent does and when it should run, including trigger routing text (FR-006; min length enforced by linter).

tools.description: Allowlist of tool names the agent may invoke (FR-001, FR-007).

color.description: UI accent color as hex RGB.

priority.description: Lower runs first when ordering triggers; sign convention TBD by runtime.
